title: Ability to assign and manage major equipment to projects in Resource Planner

posts.author: Michael55 (Michael Alacqua)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

The Resource Planner and Capacity Manager tools are very useful for assigning and managing people. I need exactly the same thing for assigning and managing major equipment and it needs to be in the same Resource Planner not some separate Board or App.

Please add this capability to the Roadmap.

What are you trying to achieve

Manage both people and equipment resources being allocated to projects. Need to be able to see when they are allocated and available.
